label: Transparent praying mantis motif
workflow: Built-in imagegen chroma-key source on #ff00ff, then local chroma-key removal to transparent RGBA PNG.
prompt:
Use case: photorealistic-natural
Asset type: Morphous transparent motif cutout source
Primary request: Create only a praying mantis profile motif for a design-system catalog, isolated as one complete opaque insect on a removable chroma-key background.
Subject: A single adult praying mantis in side profile on a garden stem-inspired pose without the stem itself, accurate triangular head, folded raptorial forelegs, long segmented body, delicate antennae, crisp wing casing, leaf-green body panels, tan leg joints and wing edge highlights, dark glossy eye, fine natural insect texture. The silhouette should feel alert, precise, and command-focused.
Composition/framing: centered complete full-body profile cutout with generous padding; include antennae and all legs without cropping. Clean even studio lighting, no cast shadow, no contact shadow.
Transparent workflow: place the subject on a perfectly flat solid #ff00ff chroma-key background for removal. The background must be one uniform color with no shadows, gradients, texture, reflections, floor plane, or lighting variation. Do not use #ff00ff anywhere in the subject.
Constraints: no flower, no leaf, no garden scene, no stem, no second insect, no prey, no landscape, no container, no hand, no props, no text, no watermark, no reflection.

label: Light-mode design-system board
workflow: Built-in imagegen board source, resized to 3840x2160 for the catalog asset.
prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous Praying Mantis light-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate a comprehensive LIGHT MODE source board for a Morphous theme named "Morphous Praying Mantis" / "Praying Mantis". The board must be a wide 4K-class design-system reference derived from a praying mantis side-profile motif: leaf green body plates, pale vein highlights, tan wing edges and leg joints, dark glossy eye ink, olive garden-stem shadows, and crisp predatory geometry.
Critical canvas requirement: true wide landscape 16:9 board, 3840 x 2160 style composition, not square, not portrait. Fill the full horizontal board with a clear grid and large readable section labels.
Resolution and legibility: large readable labels, fewer larger rows, no dense tiny token tables, no microscopic text.
Required visible section labels: Morphous Praying Mantis, Praying Mantis, Light Mode, Palette, Type, Japanese Typography, Components, Navigation, Dashboard/Data, Forms, Tables, Command/Search, Status, Tokens, Texture, Radius, Spacing, Shadows.
Reference use: Extract palette, texture rhythm, contrast, spacing mood, and interaction language from the mantis motif: blade leaf green shells, yellow-green highlights, olive-brown underbody shadows, tan wing seams, dark olive eye ink, pale dry-stem neutrals, and fine wing-vein texture. The system should feel like a focused command system: precise, alert, compact, and tactical without using military imagery.
Typography: English product UI examples with Japanese typography guidance; labels such as Inter, Noto Sans JP, Display, Body, Label, Numbers, Japanese UI, 蟷螂, 検索, 指令, 状態. Keep text short and legible.
UI coverage: shadcn/tweakcn-like buttons, icon buttons, inputs, select, textarea, checkbox, radio, switch, tabs, badges, alerts, cards, table rows, command/search palette, sidebar navigation, top navigation, focused command dashboard metric cards, line chart, compact bar chart, task status grid, operations data table, filters, empty/loading/error/success/warning states, toast, pagination, focus rings.
Token coverage: semantic roles background, foreground, card, popover, primary, secondary, muted, accent, destructive, border, input, ring, chart-1 to chart-5, sidebar tokens, spacing scale, 8px radius family, restrained shadow scale, mantis wing-vein texture swatches.
Style/medium: premium focused command-system design language, realistic product UI mockup, precise 8px grid, 8px card radius, pale leaf-surface backgrounds, leaf green primary controls, dark eye-ink command surfaces, tan accent seams, olive secondary states, crisp table density, subtle mantis wing-vein texture.
Color palette: motif-derived colors only: leaf green mantis shell, yellow-green highlight, olive garden-stem shadow, tan wing edge, dry pale stem surface, dark olive eye ink, brown-black leg tip, muted vein green, natural red-brown stress/error from insect joints.
Constraints: no unrelated bright colors, no generic purple or blue gradients, no neon, no beige-only palette, no random brand names, no weapon imagery, no stock hero layout, no watermark, no misspelling of "Morphous Praying Mantis", no illegible microtext.

label: Dark-mode design-system board
workflow: Built-in imagegen board source, resized to 3840x2160 for the catalog asset.
prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous Praying Mantis dark-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate one comprehensive DARK MODE design-system board for the Morphous theme named "Morphous Praying Mantis" / "Praying Mantis". It must feel like the same focused command system translated to dark mode, not a new theme, and it must remain derived from the praying mantis motif and the light-mode board language.
Critical canvas requirement: true wide landscape 16:9 board, 3840 x 2160 style composition, not square, not portrait. Fill the full horizontal board with a clear grid and large readable section labels.
Resolution and legibility: large readable labels, fewer larger rows, no dense tiny token tables, no microscopic text.
Required visible section labels: Morphous Praying Mantis, Praying Mantis, Dark Mode, Palette, Type, Japanese Typography, Components, Navigation, Dashboard/Data, Forms, Tables, Command/Search, Status, Tokens, Texture, Radius, Spacing, Shadows.
Reference use: Preserve the mantis system language: leaf-green primary controls, pale yellow-green highlights, olive-garden secondary states, tan wing-seam accents, dark eye-ink command palette and sidebar surfaces, pale stem text, muted wing-vein borders, 8px shadcn/tweakcn grid, and fine mantis wing-vein texture. It must read as praying mantis profile and garden-stem precision, not generic green dark SaaS.
Typography: English product UI examples with Japanese typography guidance; labels such as Inter, Noto Sans JP, Display, Body, Label, Numbers, Japanese UI, 蟷螂, 検索, 指令, 状態. Keep text short and legible.
UI coverage: shadcn/tweakcn-like buttons, icon buttons, inputs, select, textarea, checkbox, radio, switch, tabs, badges, alerts, cards, table rows, command/search palette, sidebar navigation, top navigation, focused command dashboard metric cards, line chart, compact bar chart, task status grid, operations data table, filters, empty/loading/error/success/warning states, toast, pagination, focus rings.
Token coverage: semantic roles background, foreground, card, popover, primary, secondary, muted, accent, destructive, border, input, ring, chart-1 to chart-5, sidebar tokens, spacing scale, 8px radius family, restrained shadow scale, mantis wing-vein texture swatches.
Visual details: dark background derived from dark glossy mantis eye and olive underbody, raised cards in brown-black olive, pale dry-stem foreground text, leaf-green and yellow-green primary controls, tan seams for accents and warnings, olive status states, subtle wing-vein texture overlays, restrained contrast, crisp cards and controls.
Color palette: motif-derived colors only: leaf green mantis shell, yellow-green highlight, olive garden-stem shadow, tan wing edge, dry pale stem surface, dark olive eye ink, brown-black leg tip, muted vein green, natural red-brown stress/error from insect joints.
Constraints: no neon colors, no pure flat black background, no unrelated saturated colors, no generic purple or blue gradients, no random brand names, no weapon imagery, no stock hero layout, no watermark, no misspelling of "Morphous Praying Mantis", no illegible microtext.
